response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience and solid TypeScript/AWS credentials, but significantly under-qualified for a Staff AI/GenAI role. Lacks 8+ years of production AI experience (core requirement), has no Python proficiency (required language), and no documented expertise in RAG, vector databases, or LLM optimization. Current AI-agent work at re:cinq is too recent (<2 months) to demonstrate the production maturity needed for a staff-level forward-deployed engineer role. Would need substantial AI-specific experience before being viable for this position.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript expertise and AWS cloud infrastructure experience across multiple senior roles
Demonstrated staff-level leadership, mentoring, and teaching ability with strong software craftsmanship principles
Current involvement with MCP and agentic workflows shows emerging alignment with GenAI infrastructure
concerns: No Python experience listed despite being a required language for AI development
Zero documented production experience building or shipping AI/GenAI systems; missing the core 8+ year requirement
No knowledge demonstrated in vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization—all central to the role

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflows involvement
